    "va_client.py mirrors zoputer_client.py structure but with reversed direction (zoputer→va instead of va→zoputer)",
    "Confidence thresholds work correctly: ≥0.7 auto, 0.5-0.7 ask va, <0.5 ask human",
    "Always-human decision types override confidence scores for security/audit/compliance decisions",
    "LLM-based confidence assessment considers change type, risk level, precedent, and authority scope",
    "Audit integration ensures all escalations are logged with correlation IDs for cross-instance verification"
  ],
  "errors": [],
  "details": {
    "confidence_thresholds": {
      "auto_decide": 0.7,
      "ask_va": 0.5, 
      "ask_v": 0.0

      "audit_protocol_change",
      "new_obligations",

      "tier_boundary_change"

      "from": "zoputer",

      "situation": "description",
      "context": "dict",
      "question": "specific question",

      "timestamp": "ISO format"
    },

        "commands": ["ping", "ask", "escalate"],
        "purpose": "Direct communication with va.zo.computer",
        "auth": "VA_API_KEY environment variable required"
      },
      "escalate.py": {
        "commands": ["assess", "ask-va", "ask-human", "should-escalate"], 
        "purpose": "Confidence-based decision framework",
        "integration": "Uses va_client.py for escalations"
      }
    },
    "verification_completed": [
      "CLI help output works for both scripts",
      "Confidence threshold routing works correctly",
      "Always-human override works for security decisions",
      "Scripts are executable with proper permissions"

      "localization_protocol": "Based on documented 0.7 threshold decision"

  }
